name: South American Hot BBQ Sauce
recipeIngredient: 1/3 cup Firmly packed dark brown sugar
1/4 tsp Crushed dried hot red chili peppers
recipeInstructions:
1. Stir fry onion, green pepper, and garlic in oil in a saucepan over moderate heat for 5 to 8 minutes until the onion is pale golden.
2. Add chili powder and stir fry for an additional 1 to 2 minutes.
3. Add remaining ingredients (tomato puree, red wine vinegar, dark brown sugar, and crushed dried hot red chili peppers) and cover the saucepan.
4. Simmer on moderate heat for 30 minutes.
5. Use as a basting sauce for spareribs, beef, or poultry.
